description_long: This is a compact, rectangular Bose stereo sound system with a sleek, modern design. The front face features a large, dark speaker grille with the prominent BOSE logo in white, indicating the brand. The top surface houses a control panel with several tactile buttons, likely for power, volume, and playback, set within a slightly recessed area. The sides are smooth and slightly curved, with one side displaying a visible port, possibly for charging or auxiliary input. The overall color is a uniform light gray, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The object appears to be constructed primarily from plastic with a metal mesh grille and internal electronic components.
description: A compact, light gray Bose stereo sound system with a large front speaker grille and a top control panel. It features smooth, curved sides and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large speaker grille with the BOSE logo and part of the top control panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a smooth surface with a visible port, likely for charging or audio input.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view with the speaker grille visible but without the BOSE logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, smooth and featureless with no visible ports or controls.
attribute_brand_logo: White BOSE logo centered on the front speaker grille, in bold uppercase letters.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Fine metal mesh grille with a uniform perforation pattern, covering the entire front face.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Top control panel with a row of tactile buttons, including power, volume, and playback controls, set within a slightly recessed area.
